critical_questions.question: Exact time of symptom onset / last known well.
Is the patient currently taking an anticoagulant or antiplatelet (e.g. warfarin, a DOAC, aspirin, clopidogrel)?
Any factors that would contraindicate thrombolysis: recent major surgery or trauma, recent bleeding or hemorrhage history, prior intracranial hemorrhage, or current pregnancy?
Any personal history of a prior stroke or TIA?
Vascular risk factors: hypertension, diabetes, atrial fibrillation, hyperlipidemia, smoking history.
